---
id: update-user-activation-status
title: "Update User Activation Status"
description: "Updates the SDP user’s activation status. This endpoint is primarily used to move a user into active status when they accept the invite to join an SDP organization account and create a password."
sidebar_label: "Update User Activation Status"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: docs/platforms/stellar-disbursement-platform/api-reference/stellar-disbursement-platform-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<SepBadge tags={''} />

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update User Activation Status"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/users/activation"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Updates the SDP user’s activation status. This endpoint is primarily used to move a user into active status when they accept the invite to join an SDP organization account and create a password.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
